calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Continued To Sep-07-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
J. James Li, Esq. (650.521.5956; lij@lilaw.us) of Lilaw Inc. for Plaintiff.
Micah Jacobs, Esq. (415.445.4696; mjacobs@jacobslawsf.com) of Jacobs Law Group SF for Defendants/Moving party.

ARGUED. Parties to meet and confer on a motion to consolidate. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS FEIMO SHEN and KAMRAN SHAMAEI'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is overruled.

SEE WORD MINUTES FOR DETAILS.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
